3. Dale Coyne Racing (row 3: Bruno Junqueira - 26 points; row 12: Katherine Legge - 9 points)
4. PKV Racing (row 4: Tristan Gommendy - 23 points; row 5: Neel Jani - 21 points)
5. Team Australia (row 6: Simon Pagenaud - 19 points; row 14: Will Power - 7 points)
6. N/H/L Racing (row 7: Sébastien Bourdais - 18 points; row 9: Graham Rahal - 13 points)
7. Pacific Coast Motorsports (row 10: Ryan Dalziel - 11 points; row 16: Alex Figge - 5 points)

Now, add the points of these drivers to get the combined score:
- 32 (Wilson) 
- 27 (Heylen) 
- 26 (Junqueira) 
- 9 (Legge) 
- 23 (Gommendy) 
- 21 (Jani) 
- 19 (Pagenaud) 
- 7 (Power) 
- 18 (Bourdais) 
- 13 (Rahal) 
- 11 (Dalziel) 
- 5 (Figge)

Total combined points = 32 + 27 + 26 + 9 + 23 + 21 + 19 + 7 + 18 + 13 + 11 + 5 = 211.
